languages.text: Бойцы Заркова встретили врага с мрачным стоицизмом: ни один мускул не дрогнул на их лицах. Шквал выстрелов обрушился на надвигающихся ксеносов, но огневой мощи бойцов было недостаточно. Не встретив достойного сопротивления, некроны безмолвно ринулись вперед, уничтожая обороняющихся с беспощадной эффективностью.

traits.locale_text: Бойцы с Заркова вступили в бой с мрачным стоицизмом: ни один мускул не дрогнул на суровых лицах. Шквал выстрелов обрушился на надвигающийся рой, но против порождений ксеносов пехотное оружие оказалось слишком слабым. Под сухой, монотонный шелест тысяч ножек, твари захлестнули авангард. Один за одним, солдаты исчезали под натиском механической орды, однако никто из них не отступил даже на шаг.

languages.text: The Zarkovian soldiers faced the enemy with grim and stoic determination, not even a muscle twitching on their faces. A barrage of shots rained down on the oncoming xenos swarm, but the squad's firepower was not enough. Finding no resistance worthy of the name, the Necrons charged silently forward, eliminating the defenders with merciless efficiency.
languages.original_text: Бойцы Заркова встретили врага с мрачным стоицизмом: ни один мускул не дрогнул на их лицах. Шквал выстрелов обрушился на надвигающихся ксеносов, но огневой мощи бойцов было недостаточно. Не встретив достойного сопротивления, некроны безмолвно ринулись вперед, уничтожая обороняющихся с беспощадной эффективностью.

traits.locale_text: The Zarkov soldiers faced the enemy with a grim and stoic determination, not even a muscle twitching on their faces. A barrage of shots rained down on the oncoming xenos swarm, but the squad's firepower was not enough. Finding no resistance worthy of the name, the Necrons charged silently forward, eliminating the defenders with merciless efficiency.

The Zarkovian soldiers faced the enemy with grim and stoic determination, not even a muscle twitching on their faces. A barrage of shots rained down on the oncoming xenos swarm, but the squad's firepower was not enough. Finding no resistance worthy of the name, the Necrons charged silently forward, eliminating the defenders with merciless efficiency.

The fighters gave battle with grim stoicism, not even a muscle twitching on their faces. A barrage of shots rained down on the oncoming swarm, but the squad's firepower was not enough. Finding no resistance worthy of the name, the creatures overwhelmed them.
When the shots subsided, the floor was littered with the mangled bodies of the vanguard. The way forward had been cleared, but at a monstrous cost.

The Zarkov soldiers faced the enemy with a grim and stoic determination, not even a muscle twitching on their faces. A barrage of shots rained down on the oncoming xenos swarm, but the squad's firepower was not enough. Finding no resistance worthy of the name, the Necrons charged silently forward, eliminating the defenders with merciless efficiency.

The Zarkovian soldiers faced the enemy with grim and stoic determination, not even a muscle twitching on their faces. A barrage of shots rained down on the oncoming xenos swarm, but the squad's firepower was not enough. Finding no resistance worthy of the name, the Necrons charged silently forward, eliminating the defenders with merciless efficiency.

languages.text: 扎尔科夫士兵以冷峻而坚忍的决心对敌，脸上连一丝肌肉都未曾抽动。一阵弹雨倾泻在涌来的异形大军上。然而，这点火力远远不够。由于未遇任何有效抵抗，太空死灵无声地推进着，以无情的效率消灭了防御者。
languages.original_text: The Zarkovian soldiers faced the enemy with grim and stoic determination, not even a muscle twitching on their faces. A barrage of shots rained down on the oncoming xenos swarm, but the squad's firepower was not enough. Finding no resistance worthy of the name, the Necrons charged silently forward, eliminating the defenders with merciless efficiency.

traits.locale_text: 扎尔科夫士兵以冷峻而坚忍的决心对敌，脸上连一丝肌肉都未曾抽动。一阵弹雨倾泻在涌来的异形大军上。然而，这点火力远远不够。由于未遇任何有效抵抗，太空死灵无声地推进着，以无情的效率消灭了防御者。

languages.text: Los soldados zarkovianos afrontaron al enemigo con determinación sombría y estoica. Permanecieron completamente impasibles. Disparo tras disparo llovió sobre la marea de xenos, pero la potencia de fuego no era suficiente. Al no encontrar suficiente resistencia, los Necrones cargaron en silencio, eliminando a los defensores con una eficacia despiadada.
languages.original_text: The Zarkovian soldiers faced the enemy with grim and stoic determination, not even a muscle twitching on their faces. A barrage of shots rained down on the oncoming xenos swarm, but the squad's firepower was not enough. Finding no resistance worthy of the name, the Necrons charged silently forward, eliminating the defenders with merciless efficiency.

traits.locale_text: Los soldados zarkovianos afrontaron al enemigo con determinación sombría y estoica. Permanecieron completamente impasibles. Disparo tras disparo llovió sobre la marea de xenos, pero la potencia de fuego no era suficiente. Al no encontrar suficiente resistencia, los Necrones cargaron en silencio, eliminando a los defensores con una eficacia despiadada.

languages.text: Les soldats de Zarkov résistèrent avec autant de détermination que de stoïcisme, leur visage ne laissant pas transparaître la moindre émotion. Un barrage de tirs s'abattit sur la horde de xénos en approche, mais la puissance de feu de l'escouade s'avéra insuffisante. Face à une résistance aussi limitée, les créatures ne tardèrent pas à submerger le groupe, éliminant avec une brutalité débridée tous ceux qui se trouvaient sur leur chemin.
languages.original_text: The Zarkovian soldiers faced the enemy with grim and stoic determination, not even a muscle twitching on their faces. A barrage of shots rained down on the oncoming xenos swarm, but the squad's firepower was not enough. Finding no resistance worthy of the name, the Necrons charged silently forward, eliminating the defenders with merciless efficiency.

traits.locale_text: Les soldats de Zarkov résistèrent avec autant de détermination que de stoïcisme, leur visage ne laissant pas transparaître la moindre émotion. Un barrage de tirs s'abattit sur la horde de xénos en approche, mais la puissance de feu de l'escouade s'avéra insuffisante. Face à une résistance aussi limitée, les créatures ne tardèrent pas à submerger le groupe, éliminant avec une brutalité débridée tous ceux qui se trouvaient sur leur chemin.

languages.text: Zarkovlu askerler, yüzlerinde tek bir kas bile oynamadan acımasız bir metanetle düşmanla yüzleşti. Yaklaşan sürünün üzerine mermi yağdırdılar. Gelgelelim manganın ateş gücü yeterli olmadı. Kendilerine karşı koyacak kayda değer bir direniş görmeyen Nekronlar, sessizce ileri atılıp savunanları acımasız bir verimlilikle ortadan kaldırdı.
languages.original_text: The Zarkovian soldiers faced the enemy with grim and stoic determination, not even a muscle twitching on their faces. A barrage of shots rained down on the oncoming xenos swarm, but the squad's firepower was not enough. Finding no resistance worthy of the name, the Necrons charged silently forward, eliminating the defenders with merciless efficiency.

traits.locale_text: Zarkovlu askerler, yüzlerinde tek bir kas bile oynamadan acımasız bir metanetle düşmanla yüzleşti. Yaklaşan sürünün üzerine mermi yağdırdılar. Gelgelelim manganın ateş gücü yeterli olmadı. Kendilerine karşı koyacak kayda değer bir direniş görmeyen Nekronlar, sessizce ileri atılıp savunanları acımasız bir verimlilikle ortadan kaldırdı.

languages.text: Die zarkovianischen Soldaten stellten sich dem Feind mit grimmiger und stoischer Entschlossenheit. In ihren Gesichtern zuckte kein einziger Muskel. Eine Salve von Schüssen prasselte auf den anstürmenden Schwarm von Xenos ein, aber die Feuerkraft des Trupps reichte nicht aus. Da die Männer keinen nennenswerten Widerstand leisten konnten, rückten die Necrons lautlos vor und eliminierten die Verteidiger mit gnadenloser Effizienz.
languages.original_text: The Zarkovian soldiers faced the enemy with grim and stoic determination, not even a muscle twitching on their faces. A barrage of shots rained down on the oncoming xenos swarm, but the squad's firepower was not enough. Finding no resistance worthy of the name, the Necrons charged silently forward, eliminating the defenders with merciless efficiency.

traits.locale_text: Die zarkovianischen Soldaten stellten sich dem Feind mit grimmiger und stoischer Entschlossenheit. In ihren Gesichtern zuckte kein einziger Muskel. Eine Salve von Schüssen prasselte auf den anstürmenden Schwarm von Xenos ein, aber die Feuerkraft des Trupps reichte nicht aus. Da die Männer keinen nennenswerten Widerstand leisten konnten, rückten die Necrons lautlos vor und eliminierten die Verteidiger mit gnadenloser Effizienz.

languages.text:
戦闘員たちは、顔に表情の変化も無く、無表情で戦った。敵の群れに向かって弾が降り注ぐが、部隊の火力では足りなかった。名に恥じない抵抗は無く、敵は彼らを圧倒した。
銃撃が止んだ時、先遣隊の隊員たちは、惨状の体で床に横たわっていた。道は開けたが、莫大な犠牲を払った。
languages.original_text:
The fighters gave battle with grim stoicism, not even a muscle twitching on their faces. A barrage of shots rained down on the oncoming swarm, but the squad's firepower was not enough. Finding no resistance worthy of the name, the creatures overwhelmed them.
When the shots subsided, the floor was littered with the mangled bodies of the vanguard. The way forward had been cleared, but at a monstrous cost.

traits.locale_text:
戦闘員たちは、顔に表情の変化も無く、無表情で戦った。敵の群れに向かって弾が降り注ぐが、部隊の火力では足りなかった。名に恥じない抵抗は無く、敵は彼らを圧倒した。
銃撃が止んだ時、先遣隊の隊員たちは、惨状の体で床に横たわっていた。道は開けたが、莫大な犠牲を払った。
